description:
Add private YAML deserialization types for command/manual phase definitions:
- YamlCommandDefinition (program, args, env, cwd_mode, timeout_secs, etc.)
- YamlManualDefinition (instructions, approval_note_required)
- YamlPhaseDefinition (mode, command, manual, directive)

Add yaml_phase_to_execution_definition() conversion function:
- Parse mode string to PhaseExecutionMode (reject "agent" - those belong in runtime config JSON)
- Convert YAML command to PhaseCommandDefinition (defaults: cwd_mode=ProjectRoot, success_exit_codes=[0])
- Convert YAML manual to PhaseManualDefinition

Add title_case_phase_id() helper for auto-registering phases in phase_catalog.
title: Add YAML phase types and conversion in workflow_config.rs
